Watch a demo
Try for free
Tresorit – secure file exchange & collaboration
made easy
Protect and optimize your digital work and life while taking control of your data—with one zero-knowledge end-to-end encrypted platform.
Securely store, share, scan, and sign sensitive files in one place
Manage projects with clients and partners in secure data rooms
Stay productive using our integrations - Google, Outlook and more
Try for free
14-day without limitation
4.9
on Capterra
|
4.5
on G2.com
Trusted by 11,000+ organizations worldwide
How our customers use Tresorit
File sharing & storage
Data room collaboration
Integrated eSign
Secure emails
Data residency
File sharing & storage
Securely store and exchange critical files
internally and externally. Protect shared files with password, email notification, watermark, and open limit.
We needed a solution that would let us store, upload, edit, re-upload, and share business-critical information quickly, every day, without ever compromising on
security.
Julia Berning
Food Scientist at NotCo
Data room collaboration
Keep your client and partner collaboration strictly confidential
– manage projects, tasks, and files in one encrypted, branded space.
The ability to create data rooms within seconds helps us to compartmentalize the sensitive data of our clients in a very efficient way. That gives us a competitive edge and creates additional trust with our
company.
Ivan Vladikin
CISO at AMATAS
Integrated eSign
Remove the hassles and risks of switching tools for eSignatures. Seamlessly
manage your entire document lifecycle in one place.
Using Tresorit eSign, we send the invoices via email, click on the link, sign the invoice, and it’s basically
done
. With the new process, we could cut the time needed to approve invoices from two to three days to two to three hours.
Jens Ochsenreither
Head of Medical Services
Secure email
Replace risky attachments - even the largest ones – with
secure links or encrypt your entire email content with just one click.
Now we simply upload the files to a specially created Tresorit folder, email the secure link to the interpreters, and instruct them to check it regularly to see if something has been
added.
Christoph Renfer
President of Calliope-Interpreters
Data residency
Keep your clients’ data where it belongs.
Choose a Swiss data center, a GDPR-compliant location or an overseas region.
With Boxcryptor’s takeover by Dropbox, the need to find a compliant solution became even more urgent. Opting for Tresorit was the safest way for us. On top of that, it has also offered a better user
experience.
Yassine Ghennai
Information Security Engineer at Uni Lausanne
Try for free
14-day without limitation
why choose tresorit?
Built for security. Designed for You.
Manage sensitive collaboration with
one platform
Tresorit Engage
NEW
Build
client trust
with encrypted
data rooms
.
Create secure data rooms that turn prospects into clients and partners into advocates. Collaborate confidently, move projects faster, and exchange files securely – all in one encrypted, branded space.
Tresorit SecureCloud
Store, sync, and share your most precious files in a secure encrypted cloud where you have full control.
Tresorit FileSharing
When you already have storage but still need to share files securely with end-to-end control.
Tresorit eSign
ADD-ON
Sign files in just a few clicks with your digital signature and manage your entire document life-cycle efficiently.
Tresorit EmailEncryption
ADD-ON
Share confidential information and send attachments securely with just one click.
Secure your digital world with Tresorit
Start storing and exchanging files with ease and control.
Try for free
14-day without limitation
Stay on top of security trends
Learn how to guarantee information security with end-to end encryption
Download the CIO guideline

What do you need Tresorit for?
Select a product to choose the plan with the right features tailored to your needs.
SecureCloud for Business
With Tresorit SecureCloud, you can store, sync, and share sensitive files with e2e encryption and zero-knowledge – all within a secure, fully encrypted cloud platform. Stay in control of your confidential data at all times.
Try for free
Engage for Business
Move projects faster without compromising confidentiality. Run full cycle workflows from onboarding to sign-off. Seamlessly collaborate with prospects, clients, and partners – all inside e2e and zero-knowledge encrypted, branded data rooms.
Try for free
SecureCloud for Private use
With SecureCloud, what’s private stays private. Store files, documents, and family photos securely with e2e encryption and zero-knowledge – safely protected and always accessible.
Try for free
